flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Genesee Community College fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (30.9% → 25.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Genesee Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $5.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Genesee Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Genesee Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).
